headline: Rockwell Automation Elects David A. Zapico to Board of Directors
summary: MILWAUKEE, April 17, 2026--Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK), the world’s largest company dedicated to industrial automation and digital transformation, today announced that David A. Zapico was elected to its board of directors effective April 16, 2026. Zapico is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of AMETEK, Inc., a leading global provider of industrial technology solutions.

headline: What to Expect From Rockwell Automation’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Rockwell Automation is poised to report its fiscal second-quarter results shortly, with analysts forecasting double-digit earnings growth.
